title: green-field deploy onto standalone korczewski-ha cluster
description:
## Summary
- Migrate `korczewski.de` off the unified mentolder cluster onto a dedicated 3-node k3s cluster (`korczewski-ha`: pk-hetzner-4 CP, pk-hetzner-6/-8 workers).
- Update `environments/korczewski.yaml` (context, LIVEKIT_PIN_IP/TURN_PUBLIC_IP/TURN_NODE) and re-seal secrets against the new cluster's kubeseal cert.
- Trim `prod-korczewski/` overlay: drop 6 `$patch: delete` blocks for cluster-scoped resources (now needed, not stripped), remove home-worker NotIn affinity, swap livekit pin from `gekko-hetzner-4` → `pk-hetzner-6`, override base manifests' mentolder-CP affinity for website/brett/knowledge-ingest CronJobs.

## Verification
- [x] Wildcard cert `workspace-wildcard` Ready=True (Let's Encrypt prod via ipv64 DNS-01).
- [x] All workspace-korczewski pods Running (shared-db, keycloak, nextcloud, brett, vaultwarden, docuseal, livekit-{server,redis,egress,ingress}, etc.).
- [x] Office stack (Collabora) + CoTURN/Janus deployed and pinned to pk-hetzner-6.
- [x] `task workspace:post-setup`, `talk-setup`, `recording-setup`, `whiteboard-setup`, `systembrett-setup`, `admin-users-setup` (paddione + gekko provisioned in Keycloak) all succeeded.
- [x] Smoke test (via /etc/hosts → 37.27.251.38, **not** public DNS): web/auth/files/vault/brett/board/sign/docs/livekit serving 200/302; OIDC issuer matches `https://auth.korczewski.de/realms/workspace`; cert chain `CN=*.korczewski.de` issued by Let's Encrypt R13.

## Test plan
- [x] `task workspace:validate` passes
- [x] `kustomize build prod-korczewski/` produces no stale node references (`gekko-hetzner-*` / unqualified `pk-hetzner` only)
- [x] Each post-setup task runs end-to-end on `korczewski-ha`
- [x] Smoke-tested every subdomain via /etc/hosts pin (no DNS changes)
- [ ] **Out of scope (task #9):** public DNS cutover at ipv64 — `ddns-updater` CronJob SUSPENDED to prevent accidental flip.

## Known follow-ups
1. **reflector controller** is not installed on korczewski-ha; `workspace-wildcard-tls` was manually copied into `coturn` + `workspace-office` namespaces. Add reflector via Helm before next cert renewal.
2. **mail.korczewski.de (500) + tracking.korczewski.de (503)** are oauth2-proxy → Keycloak redirect failures; will self-resolve once public DNS points to the new cluster.
3. **`task website:deploy`** applies `k3d/website.yaml` directly with envsubst (bypasses kustomize). The base manifest's `gekko-hetzner-2/3` affinity required a manual `kubectl patch` on first deploy. Consider moving the website Deployment behind kustomize so the overlay can patch it cleanly.
4. **`tests-retention-cronjob.yaml`** is also applied outside kustomize and inherits the mentolder Hetzner-CP affinity; patched live post-deploy. Same long-term fix as above.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
